microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's enterprise resilience program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing integration workflows across Fortune 500 partners (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact**.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements and custom tooling that reduced operational toil by **30%** and enabled scalable, repeatable execution across enterprise client environments.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model for enterprise clients.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as technical bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract with C-suite stakeholder oversight.

Built and deployed an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill throughput capacity by 21% — field insights directly shaped product roadmap priorities.

Architected reusable integration patterns and technical documentation used across partner deployments, enabling faster client onboarding and reducing bespoke engineering effort per enterprise engagement by over 25%.

Translated complex resilience data into executive-facing dashboards and implementation briefs, presenting technical architectures to CTOs and VP-level stakeholders to **unlock strategic contracts** and align on deployment plans.
microsoft_2023: Drove **platform adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows across Azure, conducting hands-on demos and training sessions that activated 14 enterprise client teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly in production environments.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by running 11+ structured discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical integration gaps and delivering findings directly to the core engineering team.

Accelerated client data retrieval by **83%** by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, reducing lookup friction across high-volume enterprise query workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched cloud regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating dependencies across 140+ engineering teams.

Mobilized a product strategy to eliminate manual toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-ROI investments, and present data-backed business cases to executive stakeholders.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by architecting the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping system dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating deployment across cross-functional engineering teams.

Facilitated Agile sprint ceremonies and backlog prioritization, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake pipeline and keep production robotics systems running without client-facing disruption.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable integration model for future rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by designing and managing an end-to-end CRM integration covering 200+ monthly proposals, streamlining the scoping and invoicing lifecycle to reduce cycle time and improve client conversion rates.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to improve discoverability across high-intent customer segments.

Delivered executive-facing profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks in pricing models and providing leadership with actionable data to improve financial decision-making.
